summary: Frontend axios → api refactoring verification complete. All 10 protected pages tested successfully. The shared api utility from utils/api.js correctly includes the Authorization: Bearer token header in all authenticated API requests. No 401 errors observed.
passed_tests: ✅ Dashboard page loads correctly - api utility fetches /auth/me, /transactions, /disputes, /wallet, /platform/stats, /admin/stats, /admin/escrow-details with Bearer token
✅ Admin Dashboard page loads correctly - api utility fetches /auth/me, /admin/stats, /admin/transactions, /admin/users, /admin/disputes with Bearer token
✅ Admin Transactions page loads correctly - api utility fetches /auth/me, /admin/transactions with Bearer token
✅ Admin Disputes page loads correctly - api utility fetches /auth/me, /admin/disputes with Bearer token
✅ Admin Users page loads correctly - api utility fetches /auth/me, /admin/users with Bearer token
✅ User Profile page loads correctly - api utility fetches /auth/me, /users/{userId}/profile with Bearer token
✅ Disputes page loads correctly - api utility fetches /auth/me, /disputes, /transactions with Bearer token
✅ Transaction Detail page loads correctly - api utility fetches /auth/me, /transactions/{transactionId} with Bearer token
✅ New Transaction page loads correctly - api utility fetches /auth/me with Bearer token
✅ Banking Settings page loads correctly at /settings/banking - api utility fetches /auth/me with Bearer token

critical_code_review_comments.comment: Good implementation: axios interceptor correctly retrieves session_token from localStorage and adds Authorization: Bearer header to all requests. Console logging helps with debugging.

All 22 files now correctly use the api utility instead of raw axios. The 4 remaining files with raw axios (AuthCallback.js, LandingPage.js, ShareTransaction.js, TermsAndConditions.js) are intentional as they handle public/pre-auth scenarios.

test_credentials: Test admin user created via mongosh with session_token: test_session_1774628651086 (cleaned up after testing)
seed_data_creation: Created test admin user and session via mongosh for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: The axios → api refactoring has been verified. All protected pages now use the shared api utility from utils/api.js which includes the Authorization: Bearer token header via axios interceptor. Console logs show [API] Request/Response with token status for debugging. The Banking Settings page is at /settings/banking (not /banking). Minor React hydration warnings appear in console (span inside tbody/select) but don't affect functionality - these are from the Emergent visual editor overlay, not the actual app code.
